apihelp-getheaderfooter-description: Soo hel natiijada la falanqeeyay ee madaxa ama lugta iyadoo lagu salaynayo macnaha bog gaar ah.
apihelp-getheaderfooter-summary: Soo hel natiijada la falanqeeyay ee madaxa ama qaybta hoose ee ku xiran bog gaar ah.
apihelp-getheaderfooter-param-contexttit: Cinwaanka bogga lagu darayo madaxa ama qaybta hoose.
apihelp-getheaderfooter-param-messageid: Madaxa ama qaybta hoose ee la codsanayo (tusaale: madaxa meel-magac)
apihelp-getheaderfooter-example-1: Soo hel NS_MAIN footer ee Bogga Hore
